justification: The diff correctly updates Maven compiler settings to Java 21 and performs a clean, complete migration from javax.servlet to jakarta.servlet across all Java files and web.xml, including namespace and version updates. No spurious churn is present, and all deprecated patterns are removed. However, it doesn't leverage any Java 21-specific idioms (e.g., records, pattern matching, virtual threads), so idiomatic_java21 is capped at 4.
